productDisplayName: French Connection Men White Striped Shirt
description: Style Note A brand known world over for its classic cuts and impeccable quality standards fcuk definitely delivers the goods with this casual shirt. Its pure cotton composition wicks away sweat lets you stay comfortable in Summer. Pair it with oxford shoes and crisp trousers for look that exudes confidence. Product Details White with grey stripes shirt with slim buttoned down spread collar, full length buttoned placket, patch pocket on left chest with embroidered branding, short sleeve, curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Wash with similar colours Iron on reverse Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
